title: Random House
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
{{Citation}}
[[File:Random_House.svg|thumb|right|Random House logo]]
'''Random House''', a division of [[Wikipedia:Penguin Random House|Penguin Random House]], is one of the world's largest book publishing companies. Random House's current publishing groups include Bantam Dell, Crown, Doubleday Broadway, Knopf, Random House, [[Random House Audio]], Random House Children's Books, Random House Direct, Random House Information Group, Random House International, Random House Large Print, Random House Ventures, and Waterbook Press.

[[Bantam Spectra]], [[Del Rey]], and [[Random House Worlds]], the main publishers of ''Star Wars'' books in the [[Wikipedia:United States|United States]], are [[Wikipedia:Imprint (trade name)|imprints]] of Random House, along with [[Arrow Books Ltd.|Arrow Publishing]], [[Century (Random House)|Century]], and [[Transworld Publishers]], [[Wikipedia:United Kingdom|UK]] imprints, as well as [[Goldmann Verlag|Goldmann]], [[Heyne-Verlag|Heyne]] and [[Blanvalet]], [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/German_language German] Imprints.

In [[1979]], Random House published ''[[The Star Wars Question and Answer Book About Space]]'', written by [[Dinah L. Moché]]. [[Happy House]], another division of the company, produced a number of children's activity books tied into [[Star Wars: Episode VI Return of the Jedi|''Return of the Jedi'']] in [[1983]] including ''[[Return of the Jedi Picture Puzzle Book]]'' and ''[[Return of the Jedi Things to Do and Make]]''.

On [[July 18]], [[2008]], [[Unbound Worlds|Suvudu]], a subsidiary site of Random House, was launched. It features content and publications from Random House and Del Rey. Nine short stories that were originally published in [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] were hosted on Suvudu.

In [[2025]], Random House's relationship with Disney and Lucasfilm was expanded to include middle grade books, young adult novels, and manga.<ref name="RandomHouseArticle">{{PenguinRandomHouse|subdomain=global|url=announcements/penguin-random-house-expands-relationship-with-disney-to-publish-popular-stories|text=Penguin Random House Expands Relationship With Disney to Publish Popular Stories|archivedate=20250516114424}}</ref>
